meta.title: AYADATI LAB — Medical laboratory & clinic
meta.description: Accurate blood testing, smooth patient journey, secure results. Book your slot online without an account.

hero.title: Your health, analyzed with precision
hero.subtitle: AYADATI LAB combines lab expertise with a modern digital experience — fast sampling, clear follow-up, and reliable results. No account needed to book.

services.title: Available tests
services.subtitle: Common panels performed in our partner laboratory, with reference ranges validated by our medical team.

process.title: How it works
process.step1Desc: Enter your details, preferred date and time. No sign-up required.
process.step2Desc: Bring your QR reference. Reception will guide you.
process.step3Desc: After medical sign-off, access results through your patient portal (coming soon).

trust.title: Why AYADATI LAB
trust.item1: Qualified team — dedicated nurses and medical auditors
trust.item2: Full traceability — every sample is tracked
trust.item4: No online payment — pay at the laboratory on site

cta.title: Ready for your next blood draw?
cta.subtitle: Pick a slot in under two minutes.

booking.title: Book without an account
booking.subtitle: Fill in the form — our team will confirm your slot by SMS or phone.
booking.successBody: Keep your reference. Visit on the selected date with ID.
booking.errorGeneric: Could not save your request. Please try again or call the lab.
